sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23685" key="deilokope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δειλοκοπέω</orth>, <sense id="n23685.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cheat</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">terrify,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
